sections.description: Product highlight carousel with Memorial Day Sale promotional images

sequences.neutralDescription: Horizontal carousel/slider with 5 product images showing sale tier details and individual product savings overlays (e.g., 'Save $600'), each slide linked to product pages with descriptive heading beneath (e.g., 'Shop Emerson Sectional'), pagination dots and prev/next navigation arrows

sections.description: Promotional call-to-action banner for additional Memorial Day markdown savings

sequences.neutralDescription: Centered heading 'Plus, Shop Additional Savings', subheading 'On select Memorial Day markdown items', and a single CTA button 'Don't Miss Out' linking to memorial-day-sale page, all on a red/dark promotional background image

sequences.neutralDescription: Product carousel with heading 'Shop Living Room Savings' showing a horizontal scrollable grid of product items with navigation arrows, followed by a horizontal separator/divider line

sections.description: Mattress sale promotional teaser with split layout

sequences.neutralDescription: Split layout with large mattress product image on left, and text content on right containing heading 'Memorial Day Mattress Sale', descriptive paragraph about premium mattress brands, and two CTA buttons 'Shop Tempur-Pedic' and 'Shop All Mattress Brands'
